meta.description: A config-driven Easter egg hunt game. Customize codes, eggs, assignments, and videos for your own family.

intake.instructions: Match each riddle to the egg slip you found!
intake.transitionMessage: All eggs registered! Now the REAL challenge begins...

assignments.title: The Hidden Letter
assignments.prompt: What is it? Type the FIRST letter!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch this video — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: Something slithers on the ground, has no legs, and goes hissss...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Solve this riddle to find the magic word from your eggs!
layers.riddle: A warrior dressed in black who moves in silence and throws stars...

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: Listen carefully...
poem: I slither and hiss upon the ground,
I have no legs yet move around,
I shed my skin when I need space —
Now name the answer! Solve this case!

assignments.title: The Secret Place

video.fallbackText: Something small sits in the backyard. What could it be?

poem: A tiny house where tools all sleep,
Where garden secrets like to keep,
The mower rests, the rakes stand tall —
Now spell this place and win it all!
assignments.successMessage: The word is SHED! That's where the treasure is!
assignments.hint: It's a small building in the backyard where tools are kept!

message.title: YOU CRACKED BOTH CODES!
message.instruction: RUN TO THE SHED! Use the combination on the lock and claim your Easter treasure! 🐰🎁🍫

assignments.title: The Vanishing Trick
assignments.prompt: What is it? Type the FIRST letter!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch carefully — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: A magician performs an amazing trick. Something important is part of the show...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Find the magic word! Solve this riddle:
layers.riddle: Who is Mickey Mouse's tall, clumsy best friend? He trips a lot and laughs funny!

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: Here's your final clue...
poem: I sit upon your head with pride,
From sun and rain I help you hide,
A magician pulls a rabbit out —
Now name this thing without a doubt!

assignments.title: The Mystery Fight
assignments.prompt: What is it? Type the FIRST letter!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch this video — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: Something very big is fighting. Pay attention to what it is...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Find the magic word! Solve this riddle:
layers.riddle: What wiggly, jiggly treat comes in a bowl and wobbles when you poke it?

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: Almost there...
poem: I'm the biggest on the land,
With floppy ears and trunk so grand,
I never forget, or so they say —
Name this beast and save the day!

assignments.title: The Upside Down
assignments.prompt: What is this? Type the FIRST letter!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch this clip — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: In a dark parallel world, something terrifying hunts its prey. A girl with powers fought it with her mind...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Find the magic word! Solve this riddle:
layers.riddle: What stringed instrument does Kermit the Frog play while singing on a log?

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: The darkness reveals itself...
poem: From the Upside Down I creep and crawl,
With petals for a face, I scare them all,
Eleven fought me with her mind so bright —
Name this monster lurking in the night!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch this video — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: Watch the video for your first clue...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Solve this riddle to find the magic word from your eggs!
layers.riddle: What word means totally crazy, wild, and out there? '___ Races' is a cartoon!

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: The final clue...
poem: In a race there can be only this many winners,
The sun is alone in our sky,
Before two, after zero I lie —
A number so small, yet mighty and shy!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch this video — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: Watch the video for your clue...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Solve this riddle to find the magic word from your eggs!
layers.riddle: If something is super-duper fast — like a hummingbird — it's really ___!

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: Here's your clue...
poem: A sideways symbol means forever,
A creature of the sea so clever,
Its arms reach out in every way —
How many arms? That's what to say!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Look carefully — something is watching you!

video.fallbackText: Look closely at the scene. How many faces can you count?

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Solve this riddle to find the magic word from your eggs!
layers.riddle: What do you say when food tastes SO good you want more?

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: Almost there...
poem: A voice is speaking, face to face,
Behind her hangs a special place,
A couple smiles upon the wall —
Now count the faces, one and all!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch this video — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: Watch the video for your clue...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Solve this riddle to find the magic word from your eggs!
layers.riddle: What's the opposite of serious? Making funny faces and giggling is being ___

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: Think about it...
poem: Around the sun the planets spin,
Mercury and Venus to begin,
Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn's ring,
Uranus, Neptune — count everything!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch this video — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: Watch the video for your clue...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Solve this riddle to find the magic word from your eggs!
layers.riddle: What's a sweet nickname that sounds like 'baby' but cuter? Rhymes with 'hubby'

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: One more clue...
poem: A nose on your face, how many have you?
The moon in the sky, shining right through,
A heart in your chest that beats all day —
What number connects them? Now go play!

layers.label: Clue
layers.prompt: Watch this video — what do you see?

video.fallbackText: Watch the video for your clue...

layers.label: Key
layers.prompt: Solve this riddle to find the magic word from your eggs!
layers.riddle: What word describes a groovy beat that makes you want to dance? '___ town'

layers.label: Hint
layers.prompt: Last one...
poem: Deep in the ocean, clever and sly,
With arms that reach and a watchful eye,
It squirts its ink and swims away —
Count its arms to save the day!
